channel.title: Claire Chang See Ying | The Clinical Brain Lab

description: Claire is a final year Psychology student in Nanyang Technological University and an aspiring clinical neuropsychologist. She enjoys working with both the child and older adult populations, and is interested in the topics of children’s cognitive development, dementia and healthy ageing, and brain injury.

item.title: Claire Chang See Ying
item.description: Claire is a final year Psychology student in Nanyang Technological University and an aspiring clinical neuropsychologist. She enjoys working with both the child and older adult populations, and is interested in the topics of children’s cognitive development, dementia and healthy ageing, and brain injury.
